archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) - Grounded with Deep Black

typography.font_strategy: Wide Display Sans for headings to feel advanced and futuristic. Clean, geometric sans for body.
typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

surface_strategies.hero_background: Deep black with absolute positioned ambient glows (blue and cyan) using large blurs `blur-[120px]`. Overlay the generated abstract cyan image at 20% opacity as a textured background.
surface_strategies.cards: Glassmorphism: `bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10`. Hover: `border-cyan-500/50 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.15)] -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300`.
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: Gradient background `bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-cyan-500`, high contrast white text, subtle inner shadow and outer glow on hover.
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: Transparent with `border border-white/20`, text white. Hover `bg-white/10`.

layout_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8

navigation.style: Glassmorphism sticky header (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#03040B]/70 border-b border-white/10`). Must have Bot Logo, Modules, Stats, and 'Add Dravion' CTA. Use a container with `p-4` or similar.

hero.style: Massive kinetic typography, asymmetrical. 'THE MOST ADVANCED DISCORD BOT EVER.' Primary CTA: Add Dravion. Secondary CTA: Support Server (dsc.gg/dravion). Background uses the abstract cyan image.

modules_showcase.style: Bento Grid (Mode A). No command lists. Abstract feature cards (e.g., 'Automod Core', 'Economy Engine', 'Analytics', 'Music'). Use the 'modules_tech_core' image in the largest bento card. Rest use Lucide icons with glowing wrappers.

statistics.style: Massive numbers with text-transparent background clipping a blue-to-cyan gradient. Labels with wide tracking.

footer.style: Massive 'DRAVION' text (text-[10vw] or similar), very dark surface. Links to Support Server.

images.description: Abstract 3D glass geometric shapes floating in dark void, illuminated by bright cyan and blue neon lights. Use as a low-opacity (20%) background layer in the Hero section.
Dark sleek server rack or futuristic computer core with glowing cyan and blue light strips. Place this in the 'Hero' bento card of the Modules Showcase to represent the bot's core.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx file, so build the components in .jsx/.js format, not TypeScript.
Install 'lucide-react' for icons. No testimonials. No GitHub or self-host links.
Use framer-motion for entrance animations and scroll-triggered reveals.
For the Bot Logo: If an image is not provided in the workspace, build a sleek SVG 'D' with a linear gradient from blue (#0051FF) to cyan (#00E5FF) on a black background.
Ensure all text is highly legible against the dark background.
Use 'Unbounded' font from Google Fonts for headings, and 'Manrope' for body.
